👋 About Us

Brothers, educators, and music lovers — making learning fun since 2019.

Our Mission

We believe learning should be fun. Our goal is to create songs that are genuinely educational and genuinely enjoyable — drawing on a rich variety of musical styles to help students from all around the world learn English.

🎓
Julian Levine
Education & Lyrics

Julian brings deep expertise in language learning and education to every song. He focuses on vocabulary, reading comprehension, and ensuring our content is pedagogically sound and effective for learners worldwide.

M.A. Education – UC Berkeley Ph.D. Candidate – UC Irvine Vocabulary & Reading Research
Visit Julian's site →
🎸
Jonah Levine
Music & Composition

Jonah brings the music to life with his broad musical knowledge and years of teaching experience. He crafts the melodies and arrangements that make our songs memorable, singable, and fun for kids of all ages.

B.A. Ethnomusicology – UCLA 10+ Years Teaching Music Multi-Genre Composer
Visit Jonah's site →

Get in Touch

Have a question, a suggestion for a new song, or want to collaborate? We'd love to hear from you!
